sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100162" key="sunecorou/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεξ-ορούω</orth>, <sense id="n100162.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rush out with</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τῷ κύματι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">73</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
